detail: VibeHQ architecture analysis, MCP SDK ecosystem research, project structure exploration
Produced v0.1 design document: language decision (TypeScript), architecture diagram, UI layout, threat model, testing strategy, devops plan, 7-phase roadmap
Created monorepo: 4 packages (core, web, ui, cli), pnpm workspaces, tsup, Vite, React 19, Express 5, Vitest, ESLint 9
pnpm build OK, pnpm test 1/1 pass, pnpm lint clean, server responds on localhost:4200
Created agent-runtime module: types.ts, pty-manager.ts, idle-detector.ts, agent.ts, agent-simulator.ts, claude-code adapter. 21 tests passing.
pnpm build OK, pnpm test 21/21 pass, pnpm lint clean

Created persistence module (SQLite via better-sqlite3: tasks, team_updates), event-logger (NDJSON append-only), MCP server (5 tools: create_task, list_tasks, update_task, post_update, get_updates), .mcp.json for project-scoped registration. 36 tests passing.

ChatSession (spawn claude --print per message, --resume for continuity), WebSocket handler (ws-handler.ts), React chat UI (ChatPanel, useChat hook), Vite WS proxy, streaming responses. 36 tests passing.

Kanban UI (6 columns, task cards with priority colors, time-ago), shared useWebSocket hook, task polling from SQLite every 2s, tasks_updated push on chat response, split layout 60/40, REST API GET /api/tasks. 36 tests passing.

task: web-runtime-marketplace-async: Add runtime workspace switch endpoint, non-blocking marketplace, WS wiring, and graceful shutdown
core-orchestrator-changes: Add workspace apply, provider update, and worker cleanup APIs in core
cli-workspace-resolution: Deterministic CLI workspace DB resolution and reporting
ui-taskdetail-modal-updates: Implement TaskDetail modal actions (status change, retry, delete) and hook updates
integration-build: Build monorepo and wire integrations after Phase 1
docs-update-readmes: Update READMEs with runtime switching, CLI resolution, PTY signal notes and MCP expansion
